untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a market microstructure behavior (quote refresh strategy) that operates at the order book level with timing precision (quote_refresh_interval_seconds: 30, minimum_price_improvement_required_bps: 2). The rule requires tracking: (1) individual quote placement and refresh timestamps, (2) time elapsed since last quote refresh, (3) bid-ask spread dynamics and price improvement calculations in basis points, and (4) order book depth/positioning. None of these order book microstructure metrics are available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list, which contains only OHLCV and technical analysis indicators. This signal is not translatable to a candle-based backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_6_0 is a market-making/liquidity provision strategy focused on maintaining quote priority through active refresh cycles. It cannot be expressed using only price action and technical indicators. It requires real-time order book state tracking, quote management timestamps, and basis point calculations that are outside the scope of traditional OHLCV backtesting.
